abort.no_devices_found: No supported RX11 USB Transceiver was found. Make sure the RX11 is plugged in and recognized by the system.

error.device_no_longer_available: The selected device is no longer available. Please try again.

data_description.device_path: Select the RX11 USB Transceiver to use.

detect.description: {count} RX11 USB Transceivers found. Select the one to use.
detect.title: Select Easywave device

cannot_delete_gateway.message: The RX11 USB Transceiver cannot be removed via the device menu. To remove the RX11, please delete the entire Easywave integration via the three-dot menu of the integration entry.

frequency_not_permitted.description:
This Easywave hardware operates on **{frequency}**, which is **not permitted** in your configured Home Assistant region (**{country}**).

The integration has been disabled for regulatory compliance.

If you believe this is incorrect, verify your country setting under **Settings → System → General → Country**. The 868 MHz band is permitted in EU/EEA countries, the UK, Switzerland, and other CEPT member states.
frequency_not_permitted.title: Easywave: {frequency} not permitted in {country}
